rationale: Review 2 catches two clear reuse issues: (1) `includeRight_apply` is `rfl` tautology that duplicates Mathlib's existing `@[simp]` lemma—deleting it removes pointless clutter; (2) making `BialgHom.map_antipode` and the `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id`/`map_comp` lemmas public enables genuine downstream reuse instead of forcing re-proofs. Review 1 missed these, so acting on Review 2 yields a materially better PR.
